name: Lemon Blueberry Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, beat butter, sugar, lemon juice, and eggs.
2. Combine flour, baking powder, and salt; stir into egg mixture alternately with milk.
3. Fold in lemon peel, nuts, and blueberries. Pour batter into a greased 8 x 4 x 2 loaf pan.
4. Bake at 350°F for 60 to 70 minutes or until bread tests done.
5. Cool in the pan for 10 minutes.
6. Meanwhile, combine glaze ingredients.
7. Remove bread from the pan and drizzle with glaze. Cool on a wire rack.
